title: pirea
intro: Pirea, also known as Pyrethrum or Chrysanthemum cinerariifolium, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is a member of the sunflower family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Pirea include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and exhibiting antimicrobial effects. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a natural insect repellent in the form of pyrethrum powder or oil.
